headline: Buy the dip in EDA stocks as Kimi K3 boosts agentic AI thesis: Mizuho
summary: Investing.com -- Mizuho said the release of Moonshot's Kimi K3 model reinforces its agentic AI thesis for electronic design automation software rather than threatening it, recommending investors buy the dip in Synopsys and Cadence Design Systems following last week's selloff.

content.title: Buy the dip in EDA stocks as Kimi K3 boosts agentic AI thesis: Mizuho
